lessons.title: What is Elicitation? 🗣️
lessons.description: The art of extracting information without asking direct questions. Why it's the most subtle SE tool.

lessons.title: Core Elicitation Techniques 🛠️
lessons.description: Open-ended questions, echoing, bracketing, silence, and the power of the pause.

lessons.title: Advanced Elicitation: Presupposition & Deliberate Errors 🧠
lessons.description: Embedding assumptions in questions, false statements, and feigned ignorance to trigger corrections.

lessons.title: Interrogation Light: Building Pressure 🔍
lessons.description: Applying gentle interrogation frameworks (Reid, PEACE) in a social engineering context.

lessons.title: Elicitation in Digital Channels 💬
lessons.description: Applying elicitation techniques over email, chat, and social media with asynchronous precision.
